title: What's new in Cloud SQL: Drive performance, high availability, and security
summary: Google Cloud SQL supports MySQL, PostgreSQL, and SQL Server with new AI-driven capabilities for automated health management and fleet-wide insights. The service emphasizes performance, high availability, security, and facilitates database migration to the cloud through Database Migration Service.
writeup: This Google Cloud Tech video surveys recent updates to Cloud SQL, the managed database service that supports MySQL, PostgreSQL, and SQL Server. It covers new AI-driven capabilities for automated health management and fleet-wide insights, alongside the service's focus on performance, high availability, and security. It also addresses moving existing databases to the cloud via Database Migration Service, with attention to workflow automation and cost management.
